mapper.sql: work_id , user_id, work_title, img_url, series_id, like_count, star_count, view_count, is_original_work, out_url, approval_status, is_delete, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_works WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0 AND approval_status = 10
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_works
work_title = #{workTitle},
img_url = #{imgUrl},
series_id = #{seriesId},
is_original_work = #{isOriginal},
out_url = #{outUrl},
approval_status = 20, update_time = NOW(), update_user = #{userId}
WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE tb_works SET view_count = view_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0

UPDATE tb_works SET is_delete = 1, update_time = NOW(), update_user = 0 WHERE is_delete = 0 AND work_id IN
#{workId}

UPDATE tb_works SET approval_status = #{approvalStatus}, update_time = NOW(), update_user = 0 WHERE is_delete = 0 AND work_id IN
#{workId}
UPDATE tb_works SET like_count = like_count + #{delta}, update_time = NOW() WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT t.work_id, (IFNULL(h.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(g.cnt, 0)) AS count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT work_id FROM tb_history UNION SELECT DISTINCT work_id FROM tb_guest_history ) t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_history GROUP BY work_id ) h ON t.work_id = h.work_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT work_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_guest_history GROUP BY work_id ) g ON t.work_id = g.work_id
